title: BEM-859 curator route result
objective: Create BEM-859 curator-routed protocol result. Create governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_REQUEST_FOR_CURATOR.md asking Curator to route to Claude and return APPROVED or APPROVED_WITH_AMENDMENTS or BLOCKED_WITH_REASON. Create governance/tasks/pending/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT.md with status pending_curator_routing. If direct to_claude request exists, replace with superseded invalid route marker.
